summary: W906 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W905's bundled W718 selected-difference closed-map component provider with its three W714 pi1/pi2/pi3 diagram component fields. This preserves the W899-W905 endpoint-homology-free closed-map route and still routes through W905 into the stable ExactAt construction. Product success remains false because these fields are not yet instantiated and the original four-task completion witness and review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W906 exposes W718 component data as three W714 fields, but the remaining W906 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W906 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W906 fields are W716 boundary data, W717 relation data, W715 target-surjective-compact data, selected-difference pi1/pi2/pi3 closed-map diagram component fields, the raw mapped explicit cokernel IsClosedMap field, strict preimage object fields, strict preimage map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, W722 source-triangulation data, W856 endpoint topology facts, and W721 localized-right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty W906 closed-map component-fields mapped-cokernel-field target-data relation-data boundary-data source-triangulation endpoint-facts explicit field inputs.

Choose whether the next smallest contract-closing increment should expose W716 boundary fields, W717 relation fields, strict preimage object/map fields, fixed-target uniqueness, source-image normalization, or another currently supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
